extensionDescription.message: Effortlessly manage your browser extensions with advanced profiling, insights, and control features.

get_crx_menu.description: Context menu item to download the CRX file of an extension

donate_menu.description: Context menu item to donate to modcore via Patreon

command_download_crx.description: Command description for CRX download shortcut

report_privacy.message: ⚠ Privacy: Your report will open on the $REPO$ public GitHub page. Ensure your summary and description contain no personal or sensitive information.

report_validation_fill_all.message: Please fill in all required fields before continuing.

report_type_label.message: 1. What kind of report are you submitting?

report_bug_instructions.message: Provide clear steps to reproduce so we can fix it quickly.

report_bug_summary_placeholder.message: e.g., The settings button disappears on page reload.

report_bug_description_placeholder.message:
1. What are the clear, repeatable steps?
2. Expected result?
3. Actual result?

report_feature_instructions.message: Explain the value and intended usage of your suggestion.

report_feature_summary_placeholder.message: e.g., Add a dark mode toggle button.

report_feature_description_placeholder.message: Describe the feature, why it is needed, and how it improves the extension.

report_general_instructions.message: Provide full context for your question or feedback.

report_general_description_placeholder.message: Provide your detailed question or general feedback, including context.

report_include_tech_info_desc.message: Browser, OS, architecture, screen, performance timing, and more. Highly recommended for bug reports.

report_include_ext_list_desc.message: Lists your other installed extensions. Useful for compatibility issues.

report_include_console_logs_desc.message: Attaches up to $MAX$ captured console messages. $COUNT$ entrie(s) captured so far.
